name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-rm
description: openEHR Reference Model 1.1.0 (matches EHRbase 2.31.0) — EHR IM + Demographic IM + Common + Data Types + Data Structures. Generated from openEHR/specifications-ITS-JSON via the custom ITS-JSON→Zod generator (ADR-0032 addendum); abstract-supertype unions hand-stitched in the facade.
